entity.label: Remeth
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Another form of Ramah (q.v.) or Ramoth (1 Chr. 6:73; Josh. 19:21), and probably also of Jarmuth (Josh. 21:29).

nodes.label: Remeth
nodes.description: Another form of Ramah (q.v.) or Ramoth (1 Chr. 6:73; Josh. 19:21), and probably also of Jarmuth (Josh. 21:29).

verses.text: And Remeth, and Engannim, and Enhaddah, and Bethpazzez;
